text: 2543 - وَ سُئِلَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : عَنْ رَجُلٍ اِغْتَسَلَ لِإِحْرَامِهِ ثُمَّ قَلَّمَ أَظْفَارَهُ، قَالَ «يَمْسَحُهَا بِالْمَاءِ وَ لاَ يُعِيدُ اَلْغُسْلَ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2543 - Abu Ja'far (as) was asked about a man who performed ghusl for his ihram and then trimmed his nails.
Imam (as) replied: "He should wipe them with water and does not need to repeat the ghusl."
